---
title: "Synthetic Control"
description: "Counterfactual construction with donor pools, weighting, and diagnostics."
---

## Motivation {#sec-synthetic-control-motivation}

*This chapter is under development.* It will introduce synthetic control as a frontier comparative case-study design for policy evaluation with aggregate units.

### What You Will Learn

- Why single treated-unit settings challenge DiD
- How donor-pool weights build a synthetic counterfactual
- Pre-treatment fit diagnostics and placebo tests
- Practical limits: extrapolation, donor contamination, and anticipation

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming Soon

This chapter will include:

- **Intuition** — Why “best weighted control” can be credible.
- **Formalization** — Optimization setup, constraints, and fit criteria.
- **Proofs** — Identification logic and placebo-based inference interpretation (collapsed by default).
- **Interactive code** — Synthetic policy evaluation with adjustable donor pool quality.
:::
